records.question: Which students have a cell mobile number exactly +60(5)3280072514 and live in the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON addresses.address_id = student_addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.country = 'USA' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 INNER JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514' AND T2.country = 'USA'
